reviews.review_description:
Level 16 with the goblin is impossible.  The Game is designed so you need to Buy Diamonds to pass levels. 

No way to stop the loud annoying music

There is a bug when i upgrade barrack to Barbarian. The screen becomes hard to see an blackened.  

The other TD Game on quest is  way better than this one (TOWERS POWER).   

THE GAME IS JUST TOO HARD TO FINISH. 

Edit:  i gave IT another try and now, i can honestly Say, the dev of this game did not produce a balanced game.  Who would create agame impossible to FINISH?  

Dont Buy this game even if you are a td fan like myself.

Today I finished this game, I've maxed every towers stats and my heroes skills and gotten 3 star ratings on every level and I want to say, this has been the most difficult tower defence game I have ever played!
Now I'm not claiming I've played every tower defence game out there, but I do love the genre and at least 2 or 3 of the later levels I scraped through with a 1 star rating.
I must have gotten over 20 hours on it, going back to levels and learning through trial and error what works and what doesn't, sometimes I'd drain the Quests battery getting 3 stars on a couple levels alone.
But once you've learned the key on how to set up what and where, you'll find that you don't really need any of the weapons (but it's always nice to have dynamite and the freeze bottle as a back up and they're a bargain at only 50 each).
I do think the latter levels need some rearranging, the final level I cruised through quite easily, where as some of them around level 20, I struggled with.
So you might be wondering why I have only given it 4 stars and not 5?
Well there are currently two bugs in the game, the first is that when your hero gets knocked, they are supposed to respawn after about 30 seconds, sometimes they never disappear like they're supposed to and just march on the spot for the remainder of the level, them being taken out of the game like that can be the difference between succeeding and failing a level.
The second bug is when you fully upgrade the Barracks to the green house,the soldiers that throw axes, there is a visual bug where their axes cover vast amounts of the map, when you're trying to keep an eye on multiple spawn points and you have several houses, you're basically playing blind at that point.
If those issues get fixed it's a 5* game for me.
On a final note I have a suggestion for the devs, after maxing every level I have 14 stars left, I think if someone fully maxes there should be one final thing that costs 14 stars, just a bonus target for anyone who loves the challenge the game offers.

reviews.review_title: Exactly what you want from a TD Game
reviews.review_description:
100% Love this gem of a game. What a nice and relaxing experience. Micromanaging a hero works great aswell, meta progression feels nice
10/10
I love the game, it’s really fun. I wish I didn’t have to replay levels so much to earn gems to buy special weapons, but otherwise great tower defense game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your updated review! We will adjust the game in the next version.

reviews.review_description: It's a great game, it's my go to game everytime i log on even if it's just a round or two.
Some minor bugs, however, overall much fun if you like these types of games. I am very happy with my purchase so far.

At mission N6 after 11 wave i can't do nothing with my controllers,no upgrade towers, no touch spells, can u fixed it plz,thx
If u will fix it 5 stars game

developer_response.body: Hi! We have just released an update for level 6, please try again and let us know if you can pass it!

reviews.review_description: The boss at the end of the level is simply unbeatable no matter what towers I focus on building, can anyone suggest a strategy here in the reviews since there is nothing on this game on youtube yet...

developer_response.body: Hi! We have just released an update for level 6, please try again and let us know if you can pass it!

reviews.review_description: First of all I am a big fan of Tower Defense games. This game is very similar to Kingdoms Rush. I’m only at game 6, but I am very happy so far!
